creator: barzog@telecom.by
text:
We trying to upgrade from postgresql-client-8.4.0_1 to latest postgresql-client-8.4.1 with icu-3.8.1_2 installed and have following error:
root@db-test:~$portupgrade postgresql-client

        ! databases/postgresql84-client (postgresql-client-8.4.0_1)     (unknown                                                             build error)

Why this port wants to build agains so.36 when newer lib is installed:
root@db-test:~$locate libicui18n
/usr/local/lib/compat/pkg/libicui18n.so.36.0
/usr/local/lib/libicui18n.so
/usr/local/lib/libicui18n.so.38
/usr/local/lib/libicui18n.so.38.1
root@db-test:~$pkg_which /usr/local/lib/libicui18n.so.38
icu-3.8.1_2

Older lib is also available at:
root@db-test:~$locate libicui18n
/usr/local/lib/compat/pkg/libicui18n.so.36.0

at he cannot find it.
